failedAssertions.reason: Targeted Vitest evidence confirms checkout TTL default is 60s and timeout reaping cancels runs plus increments pickupFailCount, but the lease transitions to state=expired (lease_expired event) rather than being released as asserted.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Current Vitest suite does not exercise activity-triggered lease renewal via comments, status changes, or explicit keepalive requests; renewal is only directly tested through manual renewLease calls.
